founder.name: Hajj Abdel Fattah Youssef Abdel Ghani Al-Attar, known as Obada Al-Attar
founder.quote: "Trade built on ethics and keeping promises... from our farms to the world with full honesty"
founder.p1: Hajj Abdel Fattah Youssef Abdel Ghani Al-Attar, known as Obada Al-Attar, grew up embracing the Holy Quran and authentic morals, which formed the foundation of the "Al-Attar Sons" empire. He was not just a trader, but an advisor, a peacemaker, and a pioneer who laid the first stone for modern export agriculture in Egypt.
founder.p2: What began as a passion for the land transformed, through his vision and wisdom, into a deep-rooted institution lasting over half a century, preserving the covenant and passing the trust from generation to generation.
founder.headline_prefix: A story of legacy, told since
founder.pillar1_desc: A faith-rooted education planted the values of honesty and hard work — the foundation of every decision.
founder.pillar2_desc: A trusted broker who built a network rooted in mutual respect and the sanctity of the given word.
founder.pillar3_desc: Building a name partners rely on in the hardest times — where a word is a contract, and honor is everything.

partners.title: Giant Strategic Partnerships
partners.desc: We are the bridge connecting abundant local production with global export standards, handling over 50,000 tons annually.
partners.local_subtitle: The trusted partner for major factories
partners.local_desc: We are proud to be the main supplier for Egypt's largest agricultural and industrial companies, ensuring a steady flow of top-quality crops.
partners.global_desc: Integrated infrastructure ensuring our products reach European and Asian markets fresh, supported by world-class packing stations.

products.title: Egypt's Finest Crops
products.citrus_desc: The Egyptian orange is globally renowned for its quality and taste. We pick the best fruits from our farms fresh for you.
products.grapes_desc: Carefully selected grape clusters. Export specifications catering to European market tastes.

insights.title: Articles & Insights from Experience
insights.desc: Practical content sharing our expertise in agriculture, packing, and export to help our partners make better decisions throughout the season.
insights.title1: How Do We Ensure Orange Quality from Harvest to Export?
insights.desc1: The inspection, sorting, and cooling steps we rely on to guarantee Egyptian citrus reaches the end consumer perfectly fresh.
insights.title2: 5 Indicators to Choose the Perfect Grape Harvest Time
insights.desc2: A quick guide to understanding color, firmness, and sugar ratio indicators to determine the best export timing.
insights.title3: What Do European Markets Require for Crop Packaging?
insights.desc3: A look at practical requirements for packaging, labeling, and processing quality to minimize rejections.

cta.title: Looking for a Reliable Agricultural Partner?
cta.desc: Whether you need massive volumes for the local market or global export quality, Al-Attar Sons ensures commitment and quality in every shipment.

hero.slide1_title: From our farms to the world with full honesty
hero.slide1_sub: Trade built on ethics and keeping promises, generation after generation
hero.slide2_desc: We are the bridge connecting abundant local production with global export standards, handling over 50,000 tons annually.
hero.slide4_title: Certified Premium Quality in Every Shipment
hero.slide4_desc: Integrated infrastructure ensuring our products reach European and Asian markets perfectly fresh.
hero.slide5_subtitle: Producing since 1975 with the highest quality standards

hero.description: Discover the history of Hajj Abdel Fattah Youssef Abdel Ghani Al-Attar, known as Obada Al-Attar, the journey of struggle and success in Egyptian agriculture, and how a small dream turned into a giant agricultural enterprise.
hero.imgName: Hajj Abdel Fattah Youssef Abdel Ghani Al-Attar, known as Obada Al-Attar

founder.title: Hajj Abdel Fattah Youssef Abdel Ghani Al-Attar, known as Obada Al-Attar
founder.description: Raised in an authentic rural environment, Haj Abdel Fattah memorized the Holy Quran at a young age, instilling in him the values of honesty and truthfulness. He started his journey as a reliable intermediary in agricultural crop trade, eventually becoming a symbol of trust in the Egyptian market.
founder.card1Desc: A religious upbringing that laid the foundation for work ethics, where memorizing the Quran was the first core of his balanced leadership character.
founder.card2Desc: Known as a reliable intermediary between farmers and traders, enabling him to build a strong network based on mutual respect.
founder.card3Desc: Building a strong name that everyone relies on in the hardest times, solidifying the principle that a word is a contract and commitment is honor.

timeline.title: The Journey of Success Through Time
timeline.y1975Desc: Started by supplying citrus fruits on the desert road, laying the foundation for commercial work.
timeline.y1980Desc: Building strategic partnerships with major agricultural companies such as El Wadi, Nahdet Misr, and Pico.
timeline.y1990Desc: Massive expansion in the farm network and starting to supply high-quality grapes and summer crops.
timeline.y2000Desc: A turning point with the establishment of 'El-Attar Station' and the strategic shift into international export.
timeline.y2010Desc: Establishing 'MHA Station', equipped with the latest technologies to enhance export capacity and meet global demand.
timeline.todayDesc: Launching the brand as a symbol of quality, sustainability, and continuity for future generations.

visionValues.title: Our Vision and Values
visionValues.desc: At El-Attar, we don't just grow crops; we grow trust. We believe that agriculture is the foundation of life, and offering a healthy, safe product is a responsibility we bear towards our clients worldwide.
visionValues.val1Desc: Global standards with no compromise at every stage of agriculture and production.
visionValues.val2Desc: The legacy of our founding grandfather that we uphold in all our business dealings.

cta.title: Looking for a Reliable Agricultural Partner?
cta.desc: We are here to offer you the best products of Egyptian land with the highest global quality standards.

hero.title: Our Partners in Success: From Our Farms to Global Markets
hero.desc: We take pride in our strong partnerships spanning continents, delivering Egypt's finest crops fresh to every corner of the world with uncompromising quality standards.

map.title: World Export Map
map.desc: From Egypt's heart, our products reach global markets in Russia, the EU, Arab nations, and East Asia. We ensure fresh delivery with the highest quality.

strategic.title: Strategic Partners
strategic.desc: We believe success is a team effort. We're proud of our partnerships with leading agricultural and export entities in the region.

cta.title: Be Our Partner in Success
cta.desc: Whether you're an importer seeking quality or a farmer aspiring for global reach, we're here to build a fruitful future together.

footer.brand_desc: We are committed to delivering Egypt's finest agricultural crops to the world while maintaining the highest standards of quality and sustainability.

hero.title: Our Stations: Export Infrastructure Built to Global Standards
hero.desc: From Al-Attar Station to MHA Station, we operate an integrated sorting, packing, and preparation system that delivers premium quality to local and international markets.

attar.title: Al-Attar Station
attar.desc: Al-Attar Station is the core starting point of our operations, where receiving, sorting, and initial preparation are handled through precise quality-controlled procedures.
attar.storage_desc: Large storage capacity to preserve crop quality before shipping.
attar.production_desc: Specialized sorting and packing lines prepared for export.

mha.title: MHA Station
mha.desc: MHA Station is equipped with modern operational technologies and strict control standards, efficiently serving export needs across Europe, Russia, and the Gulf.

lands.title: Our Lands and Supply Network
lands.desc: We operate a broad network of owned lands and partner farms in strategic regions, ensuring steady production continuity and stable supply throughout the season.
lands.step1_desc: Close field supervision to ensure healthy and consistent growth.
lands.step2_desc: Timely harvesting and fast, safe transport to the station.
lands.step3_desc: Preparation according to quality standards and destination market needs.
lands.step4_desc: Organized shipping that ensures on-time, high-quality delivery.

production.title: Inside Our Production Lines
production.desc: We apply a precise workflow that tracks every shipment from receiving to loading.
production.card1_desc: Inspecting incoming batches and excluding non-compliant produce.
production.card2_desc: Cleaning and drying crops with dedicated equipment to preserve integrity.
production.card3_desc: Flexible packing formats tailored to each client and market.
production.card4_desc: Final preparation and full documentation before loading and export.

cta.title: Ready to Welcome New Partners to Our Stations
cta.desc: Contact us to schedule a station visit and discover our operational capabilities and supply options.

footer.brand_desc: An integrated station ecosystem for sorting, packing, and exporting Egyptian crops at premium quality.
footer.newsletter_desc: Subscribe for crop updates, seasonal insights, and supply opportunities.

hero.title: Our Crops: From Our Farms to the World
hero.desc: We offer a diverse selection of premium Egyptian crops, carefully grown and processed to the highest global export standards.

featured.title: Egyptian Citrus & Oranges
featured.desc: Alatar is a pioneer in exporting Egyptian citrus, owning vast farms that produce the finest oranges globally demanded due to the ideal climate and fertile soil, with strict quality control from planting to packing.

list.title: List of Seasonal Crops
list.empty_title: No crops available in this category currently
list.empty_desc: Try another category or contact our sales team for upcoming availability.

quality.title: Quality & Food Safety Guarantee
quality.desc: We strictly adhere to global food safety standards ensuring our products arrive healthy and safe for consumers. All our stations and farms are tightly monitored and apply the latest agricultural protocols.

cta.title: Ready to order your crops?
cta.desc: Our sales team is ready to help you secure the best crops with the specifications and quantities you need for your markets.

orange.title: Egyptian Oranges
orange.desc: Premium Egyptian oranges, rich in juice and Vitamin C. Considered the most exported product and best suited for juices and fresh consumption in global markets.

grape_black.title: Premium Black Grapes
grape_black.desc: Premium black seedless grapes, known for their sweet taste and rich color. Carefully sorted according to European export standards to guarantee a longer shelf life.

mango.title: Egyptian Mangoes
mango.desc: Egyptian mangoes of excellent varieties with a unique tropical taste. Chosen and picked at the perfect time to ensure balanced ripeness and irresistible flavor.

grape_red.title: Excellent Red Grapes
grape_red.desc: Excellent, highly sweet and crunchy red grapes. Symmetrical bunches, cooled and packed using optimal methods to preserve freshness and nutritional value for long periods.

strawberry.title: Fresh Strawberries
strawberry.desc: Fresh strawberries with a bright red color and distinct taste. Harvested and packed immediately to preserve their quality and delivered swiftly to our clients in all markets.

onion.title: Egyptian Onions
onion.desc: Solid, high-quality Egyptian onions, featuring a long storage period and high endurance under shipping conditions. Available in sizes that suit all needs.

lemon.title: Lemons
lemon.desc: Egyptian lemons with a high juice percentage and perfect peel. A staple product sorted and processed professionally to meet fresh consumption demands.

mandarin.title: Mandarins / Tangerines
mandarin.desc: Fresh, easy-to-peel mandarins with a balanced sweet citrus flavor. Carefully packed to retain their aesthetic appearance and distinct taste.

pepper.title: Pepper
pepper.desc: High quality fresh pepper for local and export markets. Excellent firmness and storage capacity.

products_page.whatsapp_message: Hello, I would like to inquire about details and pricing for

footer.about: Exporting Egypt's agricultural treasures to the world since 1975. Quality, Integrity, and Sustainability are our mottos in every harvest.

certificates_page.hero_subtitle: Over 50 years of commitment to the highest global quality standards in Egyptian agricultural exports.
certificates_page.section_desc: Every certificate is a testament to our commitment to the highest quality and food safety standards at every stage of production and export.

cert_1.name: ISO 9001:2015
cert_1.scope: Quality Management System for sorting, grading, packing and exporting agricultural crops — M.H.A for Agricultural Development Station.

cert_2.name: ISO 9001:2015
cert_2.scope: Quality Management System for sorting, washing and packing vegetables and fruits — M.H.A for Agricultural Development Station.

cert_3.name: GLOBALG.A.P (GGN)
cert_3.scope: Global Good Agricultural Practices certification — M.H.A for Agricultural Development Station, GGN: 4063061770325.

cert_4.name: GRASP v2
cert_4.scope: Social Risk Assessment on Good Agricultural Practices (GRASP v2) Conformance Letter — M.H.A Station.

cert_5.name: GLOBALG.A.P Database
cert_5.scope: Official registration document in the GLOBALG.A.P global database — confirming accreditation status.

certificates_page.badges_title: Global Quality Standards We Adhere To

badge_gap.name: GLOBALG.A.P
badge_gap.desc: Global standard for good agricultural practices ensuring safe and sustainable production.

badge_haccp.name: HACCP
badge_haccp.desc: Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points system for ensuring food safety.

badge_iso.name: ISO 22000
badge_iso.desc: International standard for food safety management systems across the supply chain.

badge_brcgs.name: BRCGS
badge_brcgs.desc: Global food safety standard recognized by the Global Food Safety Initiative.

certificates_page.cta_desc: Discover our Egyptian agricultural products exported to the highest global quality standards, or contact us for a price quote.
